refs.purpose: Ground collection-shape choices in curated, corpus-observed operation and recipe patterns.
refs.trigger: When selecting collection cleanup, reshape, identifier, or collection-tabular bridge patterns.

refs.purpose: Ground conditional-branch and optional-step choices in curated, corpus-observed Galaxy when/pick_value patterns.
refs.trigger: When data-flow translation needs optional steps, gating on non-empty results, routing between alternative outputs, or transform-or-pass-through branches.

refs.purpose: Ground genomic-interval operation choices in curated, corpus-observed Galaxy interval recipes.
refs.trigger: When the workflow operates on genomic intervals (BED/GFF/VCF coordinate features) and data-flow translation needs overlap, merge, coverage, windowing, masking, or set-algebra steps.

refs.purpose: Ground tabular bridge and table-operation choices in curated, corpus-observed operation patterns.
refs.trigger: When data-flow translation needs filtering, joining, aggregation, pivoting, or tabular-collection bridges.

refs.purpose: Keep the data-flow brief separate from gxformat2 templating and concrete step implementation.
refs.verification: Promote after two worked Galaxy translations preserve this Mold boundary without moving fields.

refs.purpose: Preserve per-row metadata on the data-flow side: keep sample_sheet column_definitions wired through identifier-keyed steps instead of dropping into parallel parameter inputs, and re-attach metadata after map-over steps that lose it.
refs.trigger: When the upstream interface brief carries a sample_sheet[:paired|:paired_or_unpaired|:record] input, or when the Nextflow summary shows tuple(meta, path...) channel shape originating from samplesheetToList or splitCsv(header: true).

refs.purpose: Decide between subworkflow `when:` and inline tool-step `when:` for each source conditional, and pick the right output fan-in primitive (`pick_value` vs twin-cascade) so the data-flow brief carries a coherent conditional disposition forward.
refs.trigger: When the Nextflow summary's `workflow.conditionals[]` is non-empty, or when subworkflow boundaries in the source align with parameter-driven branches (step, aligner, wes, tools, skip_*, use_*).

refs.purpose: Classify Nextflow operators as Galaxy wiring, collection semantics, explicit steps, or review triggers.
Preserve datatype confidence while translating path-like data-flow edges, process output patterns, and published outputs.
refs.trigger: When choosing or reviewing Galaxy datatype extensions for data-flow edges, collection elements, or output datasets.

refs.purpose: Cross-check source-side reference-data classifications before deciding how reference assets and optional rebuild branches flow through the Galaxy data-flow draft.
refs.trigger: When the reference-data or interface brief is silent, low-confidence, or conflicts with source evidence for iGenomes-derived params, coordinated bundles, compute-if-missing branches, multi-DB pick-lists, or cohort-specific assets.

refs.purpose: Translate Nextflow channel, tuple, and path shapes into Galaxy dataset and collection shapes.
Decide how reference assets and their indexes flow through the Galaxy data-flow draft (preserving dbkey through map-overs, deferring index-building to wrappers vs surfacing as workflow steps).
refs.trigger: When the upstream interface brief carries reference-data inputs (FASTA, fai, dict, indexes, known sites, intervals, PoN) or when the source pipeline's compute-if-missing branches imply rebuild semantics the data flow has to honor.

refs.purpose: Read process, channel, operator, and fixture structure while drafting Galaxy-facing abstract data flow.

produces.description: Reviewable Markdown brief: abstract operations, collection map/reduce choices, shape-changing placeholder steps, unresolved Galaxy tool needs, confidence, open questions.

consumes.description: Structured Nextflow pipeline summary emitted by [[summarize-nextflow]]; the JSON the data-flow translation reads.
Reference-data shape brief from [[nextflow-summary-to-galaxy-reference-data]] that pins per-asset reference inputs and rebuild-on-absence behavior.
Preceding Galaxy interface brief from [[nextflow-summary-to-galaxy-interface]] that pins inputs, outputs, and labels.
